name: berkeley-certificate
prompt: Minimal education credential design. White background. Top: "UC Berkeley" in small charcoal caps. Center: Large "MIDS" in ember orange (#D95B43). Below: "Master of Information and Data Science" in grey. Bottom: "2021-2023 | GPA 3.9" in small charcoal. All center-aligned. Clean Inter font. No borders, no seals, no decorative elements. Pure typographic hierarchy. Lots of white space.
